banner.title: Travel Across Our Country
banner.description: Travel across Uzbekistan - history, culture, and natural beauty await you! Discover ancient cities like Samarkand, Bukhara, and Khiva.

banner.title: Travel the World
banner.description: Travel to the most beautiful places in the world - new cultures, exciting discoveries! Visit Paris, Dubai, Istanbul, or the Maldives.

banner.title: Medical Tourism
banner.description: High-quality medical services and modern treatments to improve your health! Get treatment in leading clinics around the world.

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.description: "HADIYA UNIVERSAL GROUPE" LLC was established in 2023 and is located at Tashkent city, Shaykhantakhur district, Samarkand Gate 6. We offer leading tourism services: Uzbekistan tourism, worldwide tours, medical tourism, visa services, and tickets. Contact us: Instagram: @hadiyatravel, Telegram: @hadiyatravel, TikTok: @hadiyatravel.

services.title: Our Services
services.flightTicketsExtra: Enjoy a fast booking process, a wide range of flight options, and partnerships with top airlines. Flexible booking options, exclusive discounts, and tailored travel packages make your journey smoother and more affordable.
services.hotelsExtra: From luxurious five-star hotels to budget-friendly stays, we find the perfect spot for your vacation or business trip. Prime locations, modern amenities, and top-notch service ensure a memorable stay, with special discounts for our clients.
services.diningExtra: Indulge in authentic local flavors and the finest international dishes, with exceptional quality and service in our restaurants. Special menus, our chefs’ creative flair, and a charming ambiance turn every meal into a memorable occasion.
services.transfersExtra: Reach your hotel or destination stress-free, with every detail handled by our team. Professional drivers, modern vehicles, and a flexible schedule save you time while ensuring maximum comfort.
services.guidesAndToursDesc: Unforgettable trips with expert guides and professional tour operators.
services.guidesAndToursExtra: Explore the world’s most iconic landmarks with personalized and group tours organized by our tour operators, turning your trip into a special memory. Our experienced guides provide deep insights into local culture, history, and traditions, while bespoke itineraries and additional services enhance your travel experience.
services.visaServicesExtra: Comprehensive help with documentation for international travel, simplifying the process. Expert guidance, prompt service, and a tailored approach to each country’s requirements streamline your visa application.

xiva.title: Khorezm Historical Tour (Departure from Tashkent)
xiva.description: Ichan Kala, Pahlavon Mahmud Mausoleum, Khoja Islam Mausoleum, Sayid Alouddin Mausoleum, Kalta Minor, Juma Mosque, Tosh-Hovli Palace, Kohna Ark, Khoja Kalon Mausoleum, Khoja Tolib Mausoleum, Muhammad Amin Khan Madrasa

samarkand.title: Samarkand Historical Tour (Departure from Tashkent)
samarkand.description: Registan Square, Imam Al-Bukhari Mausoleum, I. Karimov Mausoleum, Siyob Bazaar, and more.

bukhara.title: Bukhara Sacred Landmarks (Departure from Tashkent)
bukhara.description: Yetti Pir Mausoleum, Bukhara Ark, Labi Hauz, Chashma Ayub Mausoleum.
